## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test

## Checklist

- [ ] `moon check --deny-warn` passes
- [ ] `moon fmt` applied
- [ ] `moon info` — no unexpected interface changes
- [ ] Tests added/updated (`moon test --target native`)

## Additional Notes

Any context reviewers should know.
